channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 49ers-Dolphins pregame: Nick Bosa, Tyreek Hill both suiting up
item.description: The 49ers (6-8) will have Nick Bosa in uniform near his hometown today as they face the Miami Dolphins (6-8).
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Magic center Moritz Wagner will miss remainder of season with torn ACL in left knee
item.description: Orlando center Moritz Wagner will miss the remainder of the season with a torn ACL in his left knee, that news coming to the injury-riddled Magic one day after they pulled off one of the more improbable wins in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tiger's son comes up aces in PNC Championship with a hole-in-one
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods isn't the only member of his family that can produce big moments. His 15-year-old son Charlie made his first ace Sunday in the PNC Championship. Woods was more excited than if he had made the hole-in-one himself.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oakland A’s teammates, sports luminaries mourn Rickey Henderson
item.description: "When you see Rickey Henderson, I don’t care when, the score’s already 1-0," former A's teammate Mitchell Page said. "If he’s with you, that’s great. If he’s not, you won’t like it.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Ravens coach John Harbaugh shares powerful Christmas message after clinching playoff berth
item.description: Baltimore Ravens head coach John Harbaugh delivered a powerful message about Christmas to members of the media Saturday after they clinched a playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ravens waive Pro Bowl receiver Diontae Johnson after drama-filled tenure
item.description: After catching just one pass for six yards in four games with the Baltimore Ravens, Diontae Johnson was waived by the team, ending a brief, tumultuous tenure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes land talented running back Wayshawn Parker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team may have picked up its biggest off-season acquisition yet. Washington State running back Wayshawn Parker, considered one of the top backs in the transfer portal, announced he will play for the Utes next season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Winter Classic Day 2: Palisade boys show off versatility in big win over Moffat County
item.description: On day two of the annual Winter Classic presented by Family Health West, the Palisade Bulldogs took center stage on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz show some fight in 126-119 win over Detroit
item.description: DETROIT (ABC4 Sports) - Collin Sexton scored 30 points, Lauri Markkanen had 27 points and 14 rebounds and the Utah Jazz beat the Detroit Pistons 126-119 on Thursday night for for their second victory in 10 games. Keyonte George added 28 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC releases 2025 regular season schedule
item.description: San Diego FC will be kicking off its first regular season match in franchise history in February against a rival city.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs' OC Liam Coen addresses NFL head coaching rumors
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers' first-year offensive coordinator Liam Coen has been excellent calling plays for the Bucs this season.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawmaker wants Chicago women's sports teams to have an even playing field
item.description: State Rep. Eva-Dina Delgado (D-Chicago) has introduced legislation requiring equity in public stadium funding for men’s and women’s sports. Illinois lawmakers began hearings this week on the issue.
item.dc:creator: Tahman Bradley, WGN 9

item.title: Notre Dame and Indiana get 1st taste of playoff football under the Friday night lights
item.description: Notre Dame hasn't made a national championship run since 1988. As for Indiana, the team didn't just win games this season. It dominated opponents.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa native named starting QB for Atlanta Falcons
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Atlanta Falcons are turning to rookie Michael Penix Jr. as their starting quarterback and benching veteran Kirk Cousins as they fight for their first playoff berth since 2017. Coach Raheem Morris announced the decision in a statement Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aggies lose first game of the season to UCSD, 75-73
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Off to its best start in school history, the Utah State basketball team dropped its first game of the year after ten straight victories, losing at home to UC San Diego Tuesday night, 75-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox announce list of players to attend SoxFest 2025
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced a list of seven players and eight prospects who will join fans at SoxFest 2025, which is making its return after a four-year hiatus, featuring new fan experiences and a "State of the White Sox" address with Manager Will Venable and front office leadership.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox offseason roadmap: How the club could return to being average
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox are coming off the worst season in Major League Baseball history and barring Jerry Reinsdorf going Los Angeles Dodgers mode with his wallet, they will likely be a team that finishes well under .500 again in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mayfield throws for 4 TDs, including 2 to Evans, as Bucs dominate second half to rout Chargers 40-17
item.description: Baker Mayfield threw for 288 yards and four touchdown passes, Mike Evans had a season-high 159 receiving yards and two scores and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers dominated the second half en route to a 40-17 victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC
